title: Getting Started
content: Set yourself up for success. Covers accessing Prokeep, administrator setup, mobile app, system requirements, Growth Hub dashboards, campaign manager, outreach tasks, and contact list segmentation.

title: Inbox
content: Managing, navigating and organizing your messages. Covers deleting threads, group switching, picture annotations, search, group texting, tags, quick sends, communication channels (fax, email, webchat, internal messaging, Prokeep Collect), and inbox tabs (inbox, open, closed, thread transfer).

title: Managing Contacts & Companies
content: Comprehensive guides for organization and efficiency. Covers deleting contacts, contact import, company information, contact labels, adding contacts from threads, global vs scoped contact lists, welcome messages, updating contact info on thread close, and manager access for labels.

title: Reporting
content: User guides for generating and analyzing reports. Covers reports excel export, dashboards, and reports overview.

title: Broadcast Text Messaging
content: How to send mass messages effectively. Covers BTM templates, BTM overview, opt-in rules, sending broadcast messages, boosting business with BTM, BTM reporting, and BTM FAQ.

title: Automated Rules
content: Streamlining tasks with custom workflows. Covers setting up automated rules, rules FAQ, single user routing, and understanding rule interactions.

title: Regions
content: User guides for setup and utilization. Covers regions user group management, regions with data exports, regions setup, and regions FAQ.

title: Settings
content: Articles related to Prokeep functions including messaging and managing contacts. Covers user group assignment, customer feedback surveys, templates, account configuration, profile changes, passwords, preferences, after hours messaging, adding users, editing users, customer import, blocking numbers, recurring reports, white labeling, presence, and auto replies.

title: Tips, Tricks, & FAQs
content: Make life easier with tips, tricks, and FAQs. Covers snipping tool, translating messages, changing default browser, and overview training video.

title: Technical
content: Compatibility, cookies, browser cache, and more. Covers email setup (redirect for Outlook, M365, Gmail, BCC, Graph API), troubleshooting (cache clearing, incognito mode, error logs, HAR files, notifications), SSO, 10DLC verification and compliance, API and integrations (webhooks, Eclipse, P21, HubSpot, Dynamics 365, Power Automate, DDI, Innovo, Elite EXTRA), and Web Connect.

title: Product Updates
content: Learn about new features and enhancements within Prokeep. Release notes from 2024 through March 2026.

title: Marketing Materials
content: Articles related to increasing customer awareness of texting. Covers marketing material and tactics, and adding a branch number as a contact.

title: User Roles and Permissions in Prokeep
content: Prokeep supports multiple user roles with different access levels. Admin has full access to all settings, billing, user management, and all branches. Manager has branch-level settings, reporting, and user oversight. User has access to messaging, tasks, and contact management. Roles control what each person can see and do within Prokeep.

title: Auto-Open Prokeep Upon Startup
content: Auto-Open Prokeep Upon Startup. Help article in the Getting Started section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Automate Your Prokeep Daily Login with Chrome
content: Automate Your Prokeep Daily Login with Chrome. Help article in the Getting Started section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Automate Your Prokeep Daily Login
content: Automate Your Prokeep Daily Login. Help article in the Getting Started section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: How to Log in to Prokeep without Single Sign-On (SSO)
content: How to log in to Prokeep without Single Sign-On (SSO). Navigate to app.prokeep.com, enter your email and password, and click Sign In. If you forgot your password, use the password reset link. For first-time users, check your email for an invitation link to set up your account.

title: Getting Started - Administrators/Managers
content: Getting Started - Administrators/Managers. Help article in the Getting Started section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Prokeep Mobile App - iOS & Android
content: The Prokeep mobile app is available for both iOS and Android. It supports core features including messaging, push notifications, contact lookup, and task management. The app syncs with the desktop version in real time. Download from the App Store or Google Play and log in with your existing Prokeep credentials.

title: Before Your First Broadcast Text Message: Why BTMs Get Flagged and How to Prevent It
content: Before Your First Broadcast Text Message: Why BTMs Get Flagged and How to Prevent It. Help article in the Getting Started section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Prokeep: FAQ
content: Frequently asked questions about Prokeep. Covers common questions about account setup, messaging, notifications, contacts, integrations, billing, and general product functionality.

title: Minimum System Requirements and File Type Compatibility when Using Prokeep
content: Minimum system requirements for using Prokeep. Supported browsers: Google Chrome (recommended), Microsoft Edge, Mozilla Firefox. Internet connection required. Desktop notifications require browser permission. Mobile app requires iOS 14+ or Android 8+. File attachments support common formats up to 25MB.

title: Growth Hub Introduction: Dashboards
content: Growth Hub Dashboards provide analytics for campaign performance and customer engagement. View metrics on outreach tasks, campaign completion rates, customer response rates, and revenue attribution. Filter by campaign, date range, and team member. Requires Growth Hub add-on.

title: Growth Hub Campaign Manager
content: Growth Hub Campaign Manager lets you plan, execute, and track outreach campaigns. Create campaigns with goals, assign outreach tasks to team members, track completion rates, and measure results. Integrates with contact lists and broadcast messaging for campaign execution.

title: Outreach Tasks: Managing Tasks in Bulk, Filtering
content: Outreach Tasks: Managing Tasks in Bulk, Filtering. Help article in the Getting Started - Growth Hub section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Growth Hub Introduction: Campaign Goals
content: Growth Hub Introduction: Campaign Goals. Help article in the Getting Started - Growth Hub section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Contact List Segmentation and Creation
content: Contact List Segmentation and Creation in Growth Hub. Build targeted contact lists using filters like purchase history, activity level, labels, and custom fields. Use segments for broadcast messaging, campaign targeting, and outreach task assignment. Save segments for reuse.

title: Outreach Tasks: Creating a Task
content: Outreach Tasks: Creating a Task. Help article in the Getting Started - Growth Hub section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Outreach Tasks: Completing a Task
content: Outreach Tasks: Completing a Task. Help article in the Getting Started - Growth Hub section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Outreach Tasks: Completing Tasks and Closing Threads
content: Outreach Tasks: Completing Tasks and Closing Threads. Help article in the Getting Started - Growth Hub section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Outreach Tasks: Completing an Unassigned Task
content: Outreach Tasks: Completing an Unassigned Task. Help article in the Getting Started - Growth Hub section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Deleting Threads in Prokeep
content: How to delete threads in Prokeep. Threads can be deleted by users with the appropriate permissions. Deleted threads are removed from the inbox view. Note that deletion may be restricted based on your organization's data retention policies. Contact your admin if you need deletion access.

title: Return to Inbox
content: Return to Inbox. Help article in the Inbox section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Switching Between Groups
content: Switching Between Groups. Help article in the Inbox section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Picture Annotations
content: Picture Annotations. Help article in the Inbox section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Search - Overview
content: Search in Prokeep lets you find conversations by customer name, phone number, or message content. Access search from the top of the inbox. Results show matching threads with preview snippets. Filter results by date range, channel, or assigned user. Works across SMS, email, webchat, and fax conversations.

title: How to use Group Texting in Prokeep
content: Group texting in Prokeep allows multi-party SMS conversations. Add multiple recipients to a single thread. All participants see each other's messages. Useful for coordinating between multiple contacts on the same job or order. Create a group text from the compose menu.

title: How to Use Tags in Prokeep
content: Tags in Prokeep help organize and categorize conversations. Apply tags to threads for easy filtering and retrieval. Create custom tags for your workflow (e.g., Quote Pending, Follow Up, Urgent). Tags are visible to all team members in the branch. Use the tag filter in the inbox to find tagged conversations quickly.

title: Quick Sends in Prokeep: Automated, Stock, Template, and After-Hours Messages
content: Quick Sends in Prokeep include automated messages, stock messages, templates, and after-hours messages. Automated messages send automatically based on triggers. Stock messages are pre-written responses you can quickly insert. Templates are reusable message formats. After-hours messages auto-respond when the branch is closed. Configure in Settings.

title: Shared Fax FAQ
content: Shared Fax FAQ. Help article in the Inbox - Communication Channels section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Shared Email FAQ
content: Shared Email brings branch email into the same Prokeep platform as texts and webchat. All team members can see and respond to incoming emails. Conversations are threaded with support for attachments, inline images, and formatting. Set up auto-assignment rules to route emails to the right person. Works with email providers that support forwarding or redirect.

title: Internal Messaging
content: Internal Messaging in Prokeep allows team members to communicate privately within the platform. Internal messages are not visible to customers. Use for coordinating on customer requests, sharing notes, or asking questions about a thread. Access from within any conversation thread.

title: Web Chat - Get Started
content: Add live chat to your website with the Prokeep webchat widget. Go to Settings, then Webchat, copy the embed code, paste into your website HTML. Customize widget color, welcome message, and business hours. Webchat conversations appear in your regular Prokeep inbox alongside SMS and email. Visitors can send messages and upload files without creating an account.

title: Prokeep Collect: Get Paid Faster Through Streamlined Collections
content: Prokeep Collect streamlines payment collection through the messaging platform. Send payment requests directly in conversation threads. Customers can pay through a secure link without needing to call in or visit. Integrates with your existing payment processing. Reduces time spent on collections and improves cash flow.

title: Creating a New, Outbound Text Message
content: Creating a New, Outbound Text Message. Help article in the Inbox - Inbox Tabs section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Inbox Tab
content: Inbox Tab. Help article in the Inbox - Inbox Tabs section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

content: Open Tab. Help article in the Inbox - Inbox Tabs section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Closed Tab
content: Closed Tab. Help article in the Inbox - Inbox Tabs section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

content: How to Transfer a Thread in Prokeep. Help article in the Inbox - Inbox Tabs section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Deleting a Contact
content: Deleting a Contact. Help article in the Managing Contacts & Companies section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Manage Contacts - Overview
content: Manage Contacts overview covers all contact management features. Add contacts manually, import from CSV, or let Prokeep create them from incoming messages. Each contact has a full activity history, labels, notes, and company association. Search, filter, merge duplicates, and export contacts.

title: How to Add/Edit Company Information in Prokeep
content: How to Add/Edit Company Information in Prokeep. Help article in the Managing Contacts & Companies section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: How to create and assign Contact Labels
content: Labels help categorize contacts for organization and targeted messaging. Create custom labels in Settings, apply them to contacts, and use them to build broadcast message recipient lists. Labels can be color-coded for quick identification. Multiple labels can be assigned to a single contact. Manager access for labels can be enabled separately.

title: How to Add a New Contact from a Thread
content: How to Add a New Contact from a Thread. Help article in the Managing Contacts & Companies section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Global vs. Scoped Contact List
content: Global vs. Scoped Contact List. Help article in the Managing Contacts & Companies section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: How to add a contact in the Contact Book and send a Welcome Message
content: How to add a contact in the Contact Book and send a Welcome Message. Help article in the Managing Contacts & Companies section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Creating or Updating Contact Information Upon Closing a Thread
content: Creating or Updating Contact Information Upon Closing a Thread. Help article in the Managing Contacts & Companies section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: How to Enable Manager Access for Contact Labels
content: How to Enable Manager Access for Contact Labels. Help article in the Managing Contacts & Companies section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Sending the Contact Form to Customers
content: Sending the Contact Form to Customers. Help article in the Managing Contacts & Companies section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Reports Excel Export - Overview
content: Reports Excel Export - Overview. Help article in the Reporting section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Dashboards
content: Prokeep Dashboards provide visual analytics for your account. View message volume trends, response times, active users, and conversation metrics. Dashboards update in real time and can be filtered by branch, date range, and channel. Available to Admin and Manager roles.

title: Reports
content: Prokeep Reports provide detailed data on messaging activity, user performance, and account usage. Generate reports by date range, branch, channel, or user. Export as Excel/CSV. Includes metrics for messages sent/received, response times, thread counts, and CSAT scores.

title: Broadcast Text Messaging Templates
content: Broadcast Text Messaging Templates. Help article in the Broadcast Text Messaging section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Broadcast Text Message Overview
content: Broadcast Text Messaging (BTM) sends mass text messages to multiple recipients simultaneously. Used for promotional messaging, product updates or recalls, operational notifications (store closures, hours changes), event invitations, and targeted delivery notifications. Create broadcasts by clicking the Broadcast icon, selecting promotional or informational type, choosing a broadcast line, naming the message, and selecting recipients from contacts, labels, or CSV import. Contacts who reply NO PROMO opt out of promotional broadcasts but can still receive informational ones.

title: Use Rules to gather Broadcast Messaging Opt Ins
content: Use Rules to gather Broadcast Messaging Opt Ins. Help article in the Broadcast Text Messaging section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: How to Set Up & Send a Broadcast Message
content: Step-by-step guide for setting up and sending a broadcast text message in Prokeep. Log in, click Broadcast icon, click Create A Broadcast, select promotional or informational type, choose the broadcast line/sender, name the broadcast, edit recipients (add from contacts, labels, or CSV), compose your message, and send or schedule.

title: How to use Broadcast Text Messaging to boost business
content: How to use Broadcast Text Messaging to boost business. Help article in the Broadcast Text Messaging section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Broadcast Text Message Reporting
content: Broadcast Text Message Reporting shows performance metrics for your broadcasts. View delivery rates, opt-out counts, reply rates, and engagement metrics. Filter by date range, broadcast line, and broadcast type. Export reports for analysis. Use insights to optimize future broadcast campaigns.

title: Broadcast Text Messaging - FAQ
content: Broadcast Text Messaging FAQ. Covers common questions about BTM: message character limits, scheduling broadcasts, opt-out handling, recipient list management, delivery rates, reporting, promotional vs informational types, and compliance requirements.

title: Setting up Prokeep Automated Rules
content: Automated Rules in Prokeep streamline tasks with custom workflows. Rules trigger actions based on conditions like incoming message keywords, time of day, or contact properties. Actions include auto-reply, assign to user, add label, close thread, and transfer. Rules can be combined and have priority ordering. Set up in Settings under Automated Rules.

title: Automated Rules - FAQ
content: Automated Rules - FAQ. Help article in the Automated Rules section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Single User Routing
content: Single User Routing. Help article in the Automated Rules section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

content: Understanding Automated Rule Interactions in Prokeep. Help article in the Automated Rules section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: How to assign existing Prokeep users to different groups
content: How to assign existing Prokeep users to different groups. Help article in the Settings section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Customer Feedback Surveys - Configuration and Mechanics
content: Customer feedback surveys in Prokeep measure satisfaction after conversations. Configure survey type (star rating or NPS), trigger timing (automatic after thread close or manual), and customize the question text. Results appear in the reporting dashboard with per-branch and per-rep breakdowns. Use insights to improve service quality.

title: How to access Templates settings
content: How to access Templates settings. Help article in the Settings section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Account Configuration - Overview
content: Account Configuration overview covers all organization-level settings in Prokeep. Includes group management, user roles, notification defaults, branding, after-hours settings, auto-reply configuration, and feature toggles. Accessed through the Settings menu by Admin and Manager roles.

title: My Account - Changing Profile Information
content: My Account - Changing Profile Information. Help article in the Settings section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

content: Password Reset. Help article in the Settings section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Preferences
content: Preferences. Help article in the Settings section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Configuring After Hours & Temporary Hours Messaging
content: Configure after-hours and temporary hours messaging in Prokeep. Set your branch operating hours, compose an auto-reply message for messages received outside those hours. Temporary hours override regular hours for holidays or special closures. Customers receive the auto-reply and their message is queued for when the branch reopens.

title: How to Add a New User to Prokeep
content: How to add a new user to Prokeep. Navigate to Settings, then Users, click Add User. Enter the new user's name, email, and assign their role (Admin, Manager, or User). Assign them to one or more groups/branches. The new user receives an email invitation to set up their account.

title: How to edit Prokeep user information
content: How to edit Prokeep user information. Help article in the Settings section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Customer Import - Overview
content: Customer Import - Overview. Help article in the Settings section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: How to Block Numbers
content: How to Block Numbers. Help article in the Settings section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: How to Unblock Numbers
content: How to Unblock Numbers. Help article in the Settings section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Recurring Reports
content: Recurring Reports automate report delivery on a schedule. Set up daily, weekly, or monthly reports to be emailed to specified recipients automatically. Choose report type, filters, and format. Saves time and ensures stakeholders receive regular performance updates without manual effort.

title: White Labeling Prokeep
content: White Labeling allows you to customize the Prokeep interface with your organization's branding. Replace the Prokeep logo with your own, customize colors, and brand the customer-facing webchat widget. Available for qualifying accounts. Contact your CSM to enable white labeling.

title: Presence
content: Presence in Prokeep shows whether team members are currently online, away, or offline. Visible to other team members in the user list. Helps with thread assignment and knowing who is available to respond. Status updates automatically based on activity or can be set manually.

title: Managing Auto Replies on Your Account
content: Managing Auto Replies on Your Account. Help article in the Settings section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

content: Snipping Tool - Overview. Help article in the Tips, Tricks, & FAQs section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Single Sign-On (SSO) User Authentication in Prokeep
content: Single Sign-On (SSO) enables users to log into Prokeep using their organization's identity provider. Supports SAML 2.0 protocol. SSO simplifies login, improves security, and allows centralized user management. Setup requires coordination between your IT team and Prokeep support.

title: Just In Time Single Sign-On (JIT SSO) User Provisioning
content: Just In Time Single Sign-On (JIT SSO) User Provisioning. Help article in the Technical - Single Sign-On section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: 10-Digit Long Code (10DLC) Verification
content: 10-Digit Long Code (10DLC) verification is required for business SMS messaging. 10DLC is the industry standard for Application-to-Person (A2P) messaging. Registration involves brand verification and campaign registration through The Campaign Registry (TCR). Higher trust scores yield better message throughput. Required for all Prokeep SMS sending.

title: Steps to Take Before Changing Phone Providers
content: Steps to take before changing phone providers to ensure your Prokeep SMS service is not interrupted. Coordinate with Prokeep support before porting numbers. Provide advance notice, verify number ownership, and understand the timeline. Porting without coordination can cause message delivery failures.

title: How to Prevent Your Number from Being Blocked
content: How to Prevent Your Number from Being Blocked. Help article in the Technical - 10DLC section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

content: Mandatory 10DLC Industry Regulations Compliance. Help article in the Technical - 10DLC section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

content: Understanding SMS Compliance: Why It Matters for Your Business. Help article in the Technical - 10DLC section of the Prokeep customer knowledge base.

title: Prokeep API
content: The Prokeep API allows integration with external systems. Use it to send messages, manage contacts, retrieve conversations, and automate workflows programmatically. API keys are created in Prokeep Settings. Documentation covers endpoints, authentication, rate limits, and example requests. Supports webhooks for real-time event notifications.

title: Prokeep Webhooks: Connect Your Data in Real Time
content: Prokeep Webhooks send real-time event notifications to external systems. Configure webhook endpoints to receive notifications for new messages, thread status changes, contact updates, and more. Use webhooks to build custom integrations, trigger workflows, and sync data with other platforms.

title: Eclipse Contact Sync Integration Overview
content: Eclipse Contact Sync integrates Epicor Eclipse ERP with Prokeep's contact management. Automatically syncs customer records between systems, keeping contact information up to date. Reduces manual data entry and ensures consistency across platforms. Setup requires Eclipse API credentials and configuration in Prokeep admin.

title: Prophet 21 (P21) Contact Sync Integration Overview
content: Prophet 21 (P21) Contact Sync integration automatically syncs customer contact data between Epicor Prophet 21 ERP and Prokeep. Keeps customer records consistent across both systems. Reduces duplicate entry and ensures your team always has current contact information when messaging customers.

title: Web Connect
content: Web Connect enables website visitors to start conversations with your branch directly from your website. Different from webchat in that it creates a persistent SMS connection. Visitor enters their phone number, sends a message, and the conversation continues via text. Setup involves adding a widget to your website.
